title: VibeIDE SKILL.md YAML frontmatter (skill package)
description: Machine-readable contract for Agent Skills. Human authoring uses YAML between --- delimiters at the top of SKILL.md.

description.description: When to apply this skill; used for discovery and implicit keyword retrieval.

vibeVersion.description: Skill package format version for migrations (align with workspace .vibe/ vibeVersion policy).

version.description: Optional semver of the skill content itself.

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, skill is explicit-only (/skill:) in GUIDELINES.
